name: Arena of block puzzle
developer: 酷拉卡King, 460, 男人坏点好
short_description: A puzzle game The game has no upper limit on points, no time limit, no operational requirements, just thinking about it As the score increases, the difficulty will also become increasingly difficult. Come challenge your brain's limits!
detailed_description: This is a very interesting puzzle game where players need to place bricks of different shapes or functions. When the bricks are filled vertically or horizontally, the elimination effect will be triggered to earn game points. The difficulty of the game will become increasingly difficult as the player's points increase. There are no limitations such as time or operational requirements in the entire game. Players only need to use their intelligence to make the most reasonable placement of different bricks according to the game, and cleverly utilize various functional bricks that appear in the game to achieve desired results.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean
*languages with full audio support
